last_summary: Executed MISSAO-AUM-v0.3.md phase P1: aum search across events/facts/decisions/todos/risks (CLI + MCP), aum compact rotating old events.jsonl into snapshots/ without deleting anything, and unicode-safe truncate (code points, not UTF-16 units) so emoji don't get mangled in BRIEF.md. Updated README roadmap and CHANGELOG.
